families.description: Direct single-series requests with explicit indicators and dates.

supported.query: Show me the unemployment rate since 2020
Show me payroll employment since 2019
Show me CPI inflation since 2021
Show me housing starts since 2016
Show me industrial production since 2017
Show me retail sales since 2015
Show me consumer sentiment since 2022
Show me the federal funds rate since 2008
Show me 30 year mortgage rates since 2021
Show me real personal income per capita since 2018
Show me oil prices since 2014
Show me initial jobless claims since 2020
Show me the money supply since 2020
Show me capacity utilization since 2019
Show me PCE inflation since 2018
Show me real GDP since 2010

unsupported.query: Forecast the unemployment rate through 2027
Explain why inflation rose in 2022
Predict housing starts for next year
Tell me the recession risk for 2026

families.description: Single-series transform requests including YoY, period-over-period, rolling averages, and volatility.

supported.query: Show me unemployment year over year since 2020
Show me CPI year over year since 2019
Show me PCE inflation year over year since 2018
Show me CPI month over month since 2022
Show me GDP quarter over quarter since 2019
Show me the 3 month moving average of unemployment since 2020
Show me the 12 month moving average of payroll employment since 2015
Show me the 12 month rolling standard deviation of CPI since 2018
Show me the 6 month rolling standard deviation of unemployment since 2020
How volatile has the S&P 500 been over the last 30 days?
How volatile has the Nasdaq been over the last 60 days?
Show me the 6 month moving average of oil prices since 2019

clarification.query: Show me the 12 month moving average of output since 2018

unsupported.query: Forecast unemployment year over year through 2027
Predict S&P 500 volatility for next quarter
Explain the 12 month moving average of CPI

families.description: Ranking and latest snapshot requests across states.

supported.query: Which state has the highest GDP?
Which state has the lowest unemployment rate?
Rank the top 5 states by labor force participation rate
Rank the bottom 10 states by median home prices
Show the top 3 states by housing starts
Show the 8 states with the lowest poverty rate
Which state has the highest personal income per capita?
Which state has the lowest job openings rate?
Rank the top 7 states by payroll employment
Rank the bottom 4 states by rent inflation
Which state has the highest median household income?
Show the top 6 states by exports

clarification.query: Which state is highest right now?
Show me the bottom 10 states right now

unsupported.query: Which state is best for the economy?
Which state should I move to for jobs?
Which state will have the worst unemployment rate next year?
Map the counties with the highest unemployment rate

families.description: Point-in-time value lookups that should resolve as cross sections over a single series.

supported.query: What was inflation in January 2023?
What was unemployment in March 2020?
What was CPI in June 2022?
What was the federal funds rate in July 2007?
What were housing starts in February 2018?
What was industrial production in September 2021?
What were retail sales in December 2019?
What was consumer sentiment in November 2023?
What was payroll employment in April 2020?
What were oil prices in May 2024?
What was personal income in August 2021?
What were mortgage rates in October 2022?

clarification.query: What was the value in January 2023?
What was the rate in March 2020?
Which state was highest in June 2022?

unsupported.query: What will unemployment be in January 2027?
What should inflation be in 2028?
Why was CPI high in June 2022?
What should the federal funds rate be in 2026?

families.description: Two-state GDP comparisons with explicit geography coverage.

supported.query: Compare California and Texas GDP since 2019
Compare New York and Florida GDP since 2018
Compare Washington and Oregon GDP since 2020
Compare Illinois and Ohio GDP since 2017
Compare Georgia and North Carolina GDP since 2016
Compare Pennsylvania and Michigan GDP since 2015
Compare Colorado and Arizona GDP since 2021
Compare Virginia and Maryland GDP since 2014
Compare Massachusetts and Connecticut GDP since 2013
Compare Utah and Nevada GDP since 2012
Compare Minnesota and Wisconsin GDP since 2011
Compare Tennessee and Kentucky GDP since 2010

unsupported.query: Compare California, Texas, and Florida GDP since 2019
Forecast California versus Texas GDP through 2030
Explain why California GDP is bigger than Texas GDP
Compare Texas GDP with US GDP since 2019

families.description: Direct pairwise comparisons between two non-state series.

supported.query: Compare real GDP and nominal GDP since 2015
Compare CPI inflation and PCE inflation since 2019
Compare wages and CPI inflation since 2020
Compare payroll employment and the unemployment rate since 2018
Compare house prices and mortgage rates since 2012
Compare oil prices and gasoline prices since 2016
Compare exports and imports since 2014
Compare unemployment and job openings since 2021
Compare industrial production and capacity utilization since 2017
Compare consumer sentiment and retail sales since 2013
Compare the federal funds rate and mortgage rates since 2009
Compare personal income and personal consumption expenditures since 2011

unsupported.query: Compare inflation since 2020
Compare jobs
Compare inflation forecasts and unemployment forecasts
Compare inflation with everything else

families.description: Relationship, co-movement, and lead-lag prompts across two series.

supported.query: What is the relationship between Brent crude oil and CPI inflation?
What is the relationship between house prices and mortgage rates since 2012?
What is the relationship between payroll employment and the unemployment rate since 2010?
How does the federal funds rate relate to inflation since 2000?
What is the relationship between the S&P 500 and the VIX since 2015?
How closely do oil prices move with gasoline prices since 2016?
What is the relationship between consumer sentiment and retail sales since 2013?
What is the relationship between GDP and payroll employment since 2011?
How does unemployment relate to job openings since 2021?
What is the relationship between mortgage rates and housing starts since 2018?
What is the relationship between the dollar index and oil prices since 2014?
What is the relationship between personal income and consumer spending since 2012?

clarification.query: What is the relationship between housing and rates?
How do prices relate to jobs since 2020?
What is the relationship between output and credit since 2015?
What is the relationship between income and costs?

unsupported.query: What is the relationship with inflation?
How does housing relate?
Why does inflation cause unemployment?
Will oil prices and inflation move together next year?

families.description: Requests that directly reference FRED series IDs.

supported.query: Show me FRED series UNRATE since 2020
Show me FRED series CPIAUCSL since 2018
Show me FRED series GDP since 2015
Show me FRED series PAYEMS since 2019
Show me FRED series FEDFUNDS since 2010
Show me FRED series HOUST since 2016
Compare FRED series UNRATE and CPIAUCSL since 2020
What is the relationship between FRED series DCOILBRENTEU and CPIAUCSL since 2018?

clarification.query: Show me FRED series U since 2020
Show me the FRED jobs series since 2019
What is the relationship between FRED series CPIAUCSL?

unsupported.query: Forecast FRED series UNRATE through 2027
Explain FRED series CPIAUCSL
Compare FRED series UNRATE, CPIAUCSL, and PAYEMS
Will FRED series UNRATE and CPIAUCSL move together next year?
